query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "code2lora: hypernetwork-generated adapters for code language models un" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (Low-Rank Adapters/LoRA) and domain (LLM compression/fine-tuning) as the user's question, even though it focuses on the intersection with Neural Architecture Search rather than the specific "Code2LoRA" hypernetwork approach. It provides the necessary canonical prior work on the underlying PEFT technology that a literature review on extending LoRA for code models would require.
